name: AT_Command

description: AT Command Library for Telit GSM/LTE modules (LE910C1-EUX, GE910 series). Provides a type-safe, memory-efficient C++ interface to AT commands for network registration, TCP/IP sockets, HTTP, FTP, and modem management.
